details: The agent correctly: (1) searched for open issues labeled 'bug' in openclaw/openclaw sorted by most recent, finding issue #53537 '[Bug]: Gemini 2.5 Pro thinking content loops infinitely on model switch'; (2) searched for open PRs referencing issue #53537 and got 0 results; (3) correctly concluded no fix is in progress based on actual search results, not assumption.
